per_turn_leaks.student_message: I know it can be scary to think about, but do you notice any sweating or feeling faint during these episodes?
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: I actually have been having some night sweats. It's pretty embarrassing, to be honest - my pajamas are getting drenched every night and I feel like I'm running a fever even when my temperature isn't that high.

per_turn_leaks.student_message: I can see this is taking a toll on you. How has your energy been? Your appetite?
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: My appetite has actually decreased over the past few days, and even when I do eat, nothing really tastes good to me right now. It's like I've lost all interest in food.

per_turn_leaks.student_message: Have you had any fevers or night sweats? I know it might seem unrelated, but it helps me understand the full picture.
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: I've been having a low-grade fever on and off, usually worse in the evenings. And like I mentioned earlier, I have night sweats that are pretty intense.

per_turn_leaks.student_message: I hate to ask this, but it's really important — has anyone in your family had serious health problems?
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: My mom has asthma, and my maternal grandmother passed away from lung cancer.
